name: Rolex Submariner Date
description: The ultimate diving watch, featuring a robust Oystersteel case and a unidirectional rotatable bezel with a Cerachrom insert.

name: Omega Speedmaster Professional
description: The legendary chronograph that went to the moon. Features a black dial covered by a hesalite crystal and a black bezel with a tachymetric scale.

name: Tag Heuer Carrera
description: A classic yet contemporary sports watch inspired by motor racing. Bold, readable, and built for speed.

name: Audemars Piguet
description: The iconic luxury sports watch featuring an octagonal bezel, 'Grande Tapisserie' dial, and integrated bracelet.

name: Casio F-91W
description: The quintessential digital watch. Known for its reliability, retro design, and everyday practicality. A true global icon.

name: Breitling Navitimer B01
description: The legendary pilot's watch featuring a circular slide rule for airborne navigation and an in-house chronograph movement.

name: Cartier Tank Francaise
description: A timeless symbol of elegance. The Tank Francaise updates the legacy of the Tank watch with a chain-link bracelet.

name: Michael Kors Bradshaw
description: A perfectly proportioned watch with a classic chronograph dial and a stylish two-tone finish.

name: Fossil Jacqueline
description: A classic design with a modern spin, featuring a slim profile and an elegant leather strap.

name: Daniel Wellington Petite
description: Minimalist and elegant, the Petite features a beautiful mesh bracelet and a clean white dial.

name: Citizen Eco-Drive Silhouette
description: Powered by light, any light. Never needs a battery. Features sparkling crystal accents.

name: Bulova Rubaiyat
description: Legendary heritage reinvented. Features hand-set diamonds individually placed on the case and dial.

name: Apple Watch Series 9
description: A brighter display, advanced health sensors, and the magic of Double Tap. The ultimate device for a healthy life.

name: Samsung Galaxy Watch 6
description: Track your sleep, fitness, and wellness with a larger screen and a thinner bezel.

name: Garmin Fenix 7
description: The ultimate multisport GPS watch with a scratch-resistant Power Sapphire solar charging lens.

name: Fitbit Sense 2
description: Advanced health and fitness smartwatch that helps you manage stress and sleep better.

name: Amazfit GTR 4
description: A classic round design packed with fitness features and an incredible 14-day battery life.

name: Huawei Watch GT 4
description: Fashion meets technology. Features a unique octagonal design, precise health tracking, and long battery life.
